detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MustardAPEClassic.openTrading() (MustardAPEClassic.sol#585-611):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#595)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#597)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#597)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (MustardAPEClassic.sol#607)
	MustardAPEClassic.tradingOpen (MustardAPEClassic.sol#293) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MustardAPEClassic.openTrading() (MustardAPEClassic.sol#585-611)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MustardAPEClassic._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#451-515):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#497)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#529-541)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#503)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#513)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#667)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#647)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#649)
	MustardAPEClassic._rOwned (MustardAPEClassic.sol#253) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MustardAPEClassic._takeTeam(uint256) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#661-669)
	- MustardAPEClassic._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#643-657)
	- MustardAPEClassic.balanceOf(address) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#369-373)
	- MustardAPEClassic.constructor() (MustardAPEClassic.sol#319-333)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#513)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#675)
	MustardAPEClassic._rTotal (MustardAPEClassic.sol#269) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MustardAPEClassic._getCurrentSupply() (MustardAPEClassic.sol#767-777)
	- MustardAPEClassic._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#673-679)
	- MustardAPEClassic.constructor() (MustardAPEClassic.sol#319-333)
	- MustardAPEClassic.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MustardAPEClassic.sol#425-433)
